emails.subject: NG Can
emails.body: I am pulling a liquidated value for the NG Canadian book. I am showing expense of (456,816). The counterparty names for these deals are FT Canada. The DPR currently shows a zero liquidated value. Shannon McPearson Enron North America 713-853-5944 Shannon.McPearson@enron.com
